last_replies.com:
A cadre of UNICEF gents were out campaigning for refugee donations today, putting on quite the performance. Naturally, only the women were biting. Cheeky bastards! They clearly targeted the young, darling things, someone obviously received the golden memo on exactly who their target audience should be.
Still, watching the spectacle unfold from a distance, it is utterly fascinating. The women adopt this dazzlingly endearing, radiant glow the moment they feel they are saving the world. It creates this absolutely exquisite scene where you simply want to sweep them up in a hug.
